allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.mcpServers && j.mcpServers['figma-api']\) { const s={...j.mcpServers['figma-api']}; if\(s.env\) Object.keys\(s.env\).forEach\(k=>s.env[k]='[REDACTED]'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({mcpServers:{'figma-api':s}},null,2\)\); } else console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j,null,2\)\);")
